projectDescription: A stateful, session-aware Go load simulator that models real user navigation behavior to stress-test web applications before high-traffic events.
keyFeatures: Stateful session-aware load simulation with isolated per-lemming cookie jars
Three-tier geographic concurrency model: Terrain, Pack, and Limit
Automatic URL discovery via sitemap.xml, robots.txt, or depth-bounded crawl
Linear ramp-up to model real traffic curves over configurable duration
First-class waiting room integration with the andreimerlescu/room package
Live browser dashboard with one-time cryptographic token authentication
Prometheus metrics endpoint with 11 metrics under the lemmings_ namespace
Multi-target report delivery: local filesystem, AWS S3, and email (SMTP)
SHA-512 body checksum comparison to detect degraded content under load
Race-detector-verified atomic counters for exact metric accuracy
